title: Become a Founder
subtitle: Back the game's development and lock in Founder status. The free game stays fully competitive. Pro adds depth, comfort and identity, never an advantage.
error: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
alreadyPro: You're Pro. Thank you for backing Cycling Zone.
alreadyFounder: You're a Founder. Thank you for backing Cycling Zone from the start.
founderSeatsFull: All Founder seats are taken. New subscribers still get full Pro.
founderExplainer: The first 50 paying subscribers become Founders. Founders keep a permanent Founder badge, even if the subscription later lapses.
fairnessNote: Never pay-to-win: money buys depth, comfort and cosmetics, never a competitive edge.
